case_title: GOLDEN GATEWAY CENTER, A CALIF. LTD. PART. vs. MOCK, BARBARA JEAN et al

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOLDEN GATEWAY CENTER, A CALIF. LTD. PART. DEFAULT OF JUL-29-1996 SET ASIDE
